raw_error_example:
output/test_filter.sv:1: syntax error
I give up.
root_cause: The module name “output/test_filter” contains a slash character, which is illegal in SystemVerilog identifiers and causes a syntax error.
fix_rule: Use only valid identifier characters (letters, digits, underscores) for module names; replace any path separators like slashes with underscores or remove them.
